subject: english
description: be going to や will be を使ってbe動詞の未来を表します。

questions.question: I ___ happy tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 未来形には will be を使います

questions.explanation: 未来形には will be を使います

questions.explanation: 未来形には will be を使います

questions.question: We ___ ready soon.
questions.explanation: 未来形には will be を使います

questions.question: You ___ happy tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 未来形には will be を使います

questions.question: It ___ cold tomorrow.

questions.question: The students ___ excited tomorrow. (be動詞・未来)
questions.explanation: 未来形の be 動詞は will be です

questions.question: My parents ___ home tonight. (be動詞・未来)
